title: viola heterophylla subsp. ovatifolia
intro: Viola heterophylla subsp. ovatifolia, also known as the California violet or yellow violet, is a subspecies of the viola heterophylla plant, a flowering perennial native to the western United States. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola heterophylla subsp. ovatifolia include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as soothing digestive problems and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, salves, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
